versions.version_description: This can be played on either acoustic or clean electric guitar,where chords are not so well known i have added instruction to top of tab,i have also included all chords and lyrics,whilst keeping it achievable to play with ease.https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zpOULjyy-n8.
I saw this from zerobio youtube channel, it sounds great. Please go to: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Xwh00p1slWk.
Capo on the 1st fret to match original song.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
A                 E/A           D[E]/A       E/A
A/F#              E/F#          D[E]/F#      E/F#
[ch]A/D[/ch]               [ch]E/D[/ch]           D[E]/A       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch] 


[Verse]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]E/A[/ch]           [ch]D/A[/ch]     [ch]E/A[/ch]
I cant fight this feeling any longer[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]F#/B[/ch]              [ch]Esus4[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
And yet Im still afraid to let it flow[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]E/A[/ch]               G5dim [ch]F#[/ch]
What started out as friendship, has grown stronger[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]A/C#[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]Esus4[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
I only wish I had the strength to let it show[/tab]


[tab][ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]E/A[/ch]           [ch]D/A[/ch]
I tell myself that I cant hold out forever[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]F#/B[/ch]              [ch]Esus4[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
I said there is no reason for my fear[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]E/A[/ch]          G5dim [ch]F#[/ch]
Cause I feel so secure when were together[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]A/C#[/ch] 
You give my life direction[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Esus4[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
You make everything so clear[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]              
And even as I wander[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]E/C#[/ch]
Im keeping you in sight[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]             
Youre a candle in the window[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]A/C#[/ch]      [ch]Esus4[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
On a cold, dark winters night[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]Esus4[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
And Im getting closer than I ever thought I might[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]D/E[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
And I cant fight this feeling anymore[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
Ive forgotten what I started fighting for[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]A/C#[/ch]
Its time to bring this ship into the shore[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]E[/ch]              
And throw away the oars, forever[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D/E[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
Cause I cant fight this feeling anymore[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
Ive forgotten what I started fighting for[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]A/C#[/ch]
And if I have to crawl upon the floor[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]Bm[/ch]
Come crashing through your door[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
Baby, I cant fight this feeling anymore[/tab]
